Field.label: Galaxy Classification
Field.description: Galaxy type: 0-central, 1-satellite

Field.label: X
Field.description: Co-moving X position of the (sub)halo

Field.label: Y
Field.description: Co-moving Y position of the (sub)halo

Field.label: Z
Field.description: Co-moving Z position of the (sub)halo

Field.label: X Velocity
Field.description: X component of the galaxy/halo velocity

Field.label: Y Velocity
Field.description: Y component of the galaxy/halo velocity

Field.label: Z Velocity
Field.description: Z component of the galaxy/halo velocity

Field.label: Snapshot Number
Field.description: Snapshot number in the simulation

Field.label: descendant
Field.description: Tree-local index of the descendant galaxy

Field.label: Merger Type
Field.description: Merger type: 0=none; 1=minor merger; 2=major merger; 3=disk instability; 4=disrupt to ICS

Field.label: Galaxy Age
Field.description: Time-step between this galaxy and parent

Field.label: Star Formation Rate in the Disk
Field.description: Star formation rate in the disk

Field.label: Star formation Rate in the Bulge
Field.description: Star formation rate in the bulge

Field.label: Avg. Metallicity of Star-forming Disk Gas
Field.description: Metallicty of star forming disk gas (averaged over timesteps between two snapshots)(Mass of metals)/(Mass of star forming disk gas)

Field.label: Avg. Metallicity of Star-forming Bulge Gas
Field.description: Metallicty of star forming bulge gas (averaged over timesteps between two snapshots)(Mass of metals)/(Mass of star forming bulge gas)

Field.label: Cold Gas Mass
Field.description: Cold gas mass of the galaxy

Field.label: Metals Cold Gas Mass
Field.description: Mass of metals in the cold gas phase

Field.label: Disk Scale Radius
Field.description: Scale radius of the stellar disk

Field.label: Galaxy ID
Field.description: An unique ID that stays with the galaxy/halo for its entire history

Field.label: Central Galaxy ID
Field.description: The unique Galaxy ID of the central galaxy this galaxy/halo belongs to

Field.label: Simulation Halo ID
Field.description: An ID for the (sub)halo passed through from the original simulation

Field.label: Descendant Galaxy Index
Field.description: Index for the descendant galaxy after a merger

Field.label: Descendant Snapshot
Field.description: Snapshot for the descendant galaxy

Field.label: X Spin
Field.description: X-component of specific angular momentum. Defined as Spin[3] := 1/N \sum_{i=1}^{N} (r_i - rcen) \cross (v_i - vcen), where r_i is the physical position of the i'th particle, rcen is the position of the center of mass, v_i is the peculiar velocity of the particle and vcen is the bulk velocity of the halo

Field.label: Y Spin
Field.description: Y-component of specific angular momentum. Defined as Spin[3] := 1/N \sum_{i=1}^{N} (r_i - rcen) \cross (v_i - vcen), where r_i is the physical position of the i'th particle, rcen is the position of the center of mass, v_i is the peculiar velocity of the particle and vcen is the bulk velocity of the halo

Field.label: Z Spin
Field.description: Z-component of specific angular momentum. Defined as Spin[3] := 1/N \sum_{i=1}^{N} (r_i - rcen) \cross (v_i - vcen), where r_i is the physical position of the i'th particle, rcen is the position of the center of mass, v_i is the peculiar velocity of the particle and vcen is the bulk velocity of the halo

Field.label: Total Particles
Field.description: Total number of simulation particles in the dark matter halo

Field.label: Mvir
Field.description: Virial mass of the (sub)halo

Field.label: Central Galaxy Mvir
Field.description: Virial mass of the central galaxy halo

Field.label: Rvir
Field.description: Physical virial radius of the (sub)halo

Field.label: Vvir
Field.description: Virial Speed of the (sub)halo

Field.label: Vmax
Field.description: Maximum circular speed of the (sub)halo

Field.label: Velocity Dispersion
Field.description: Velocity dispersion of the (sub)halo

Field.label: Total Stellar Mass
Field.description: Total stellar mass of galaxy

Field.label: Bulge Stellar Mass
Field.description: Stellar mass in the bulge component of the galaxy

Field.label: Hot Gas Mass
Field.description: Hot gas mass of the galaxy

Field.label: Ejected Gas Mass
Field.description: Mass of gas ejected from both the galaxy and the halo

Field.label: Black Hole Mass
Field.description: Mass of the black hole

Field.label: Intracluster Stars Mass
Field.description: Stellar mass in the intracluster stars

Field.label: Metals Total Stellar Mass
Field.description: Mass of metals in the galaxy stars (bulge + disk)

Field.label: Metals Bulge Mass
Field.description: Mass of metals in the bulge stars

Field.label: Metals Hot Gas Mass
Field.description: Mass of metals in the hot gas phase

Field.label: Metals Ejected Gas Mass
Field.description: Mass of metals in the gas ejected from the galaxy

Field.label: Metals IntraCluster Stars Mass
Field.description: Mass of metals in the intracluster stars

Field.label: Hot Gas Cooling Rate
Field.description: Hot halo gas cooling rate

Field.label: AGN Heating Rate
Field.description: AGN Heating Rate

Field.label: Quasar BH Accretion Mass
Field.description: The mass accreted onto the black hole in the quasar mode across the current simulation time step.

Field.label: Time of Last Major Merger
Field.description: Time of last major merger

Field.label: Time of Last Minor Merger
Field.description: Time of last minor merger

Field.label: Supernova Cold Gas Outflow Rate
Field.description: Cold gas outflow rate from supernovae

Field.label: Subhalo Mvir at Infall
Field.description: Subhalo Mvir at infall

Field.label: Subhalo Vvir at Infall
Field.description: Subhalo Vvir at infall

Field.label: Subhalo Vmax at Infall
Field.description: Subhalo Vmax at infall

Field.label: Total Star Formation Rate
Field.description: Total star formation rate, (includes both disk and bulge components)

Field.label: Maximum circular velocity of the halo
Field.description: Maximum circular velocity attained in the assembly history (susceptible to spikes during mergers, see Vrelax for a better property)

Field.label: Flyby Flag
Field.description: 1-is a flyby halo, 0-normal halo
